Save the campaign and click “Add Trigger” Use BBB
Change time/Date of messages there are 8
Change email content (Gym name, email text, picture, and address info)
Change the webhook to your LIVE Webhook from Zapier
Make sure the Checked Tags are correct and match Zapier
